title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
subTitle: Suresh faces opposition from the father of the woman he loves, who refuses their marriage proposal. However, fate has other plans for him.

title: Karisakaattu Poove
subTitle: Pounraasu, who is secretly in love with Nagamani, chooses to remain silent when her marriage is fixed with his elder brother since he does not want to come in the way of his elder brother's happiness.

title: Kama Raasu
subTitle: Kamarasu, a dedicated driver at Latha's house, selflessly aids those in need. However, his life takes a dramatic turn after the tragic loss of his mother and lover.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Asathal
subTitle: Vetri and his two best friends live together and follow a carefree lifestyle. However, things become complicated when they encounter an abandoned baby at their doorstep.

title: Thaimel Aanai
subTitle: Young Raja resolves to exact revenge for his mother's and sister's deaths. Nevertheless, his law-abiding police officer friend is unwilling to allow him to enforce the law on his own.

title: Per Sollum Pillai
subTitle: Rajalakshmi raises Ramu, an orphan, as her own son who in turn always protects his foster family. However, he must stop his malicious foster brothers from marrying off their sister to a gangster.

title: Sundara Purushan
subTitle: A man loves his cousin, but circumstances force him to leave home. Years later, when he learns that she loves someone else, he tries to help her reunite with her lover.

title: Arasu
subTitle: Thirunavukkarasu, a soft-spoken man, has two good-natured parents who are involved in the upliftment of society. However, when his parents are brutally assassinated, he seeks revenge for their deaths.

title: February 14
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, begins his college education and falls for Pooja, an American girl who is in India to complete her graduation. However, things become complicated when she wants to go back.

title: February 14
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, begins his college education and falls for Pooja, an American girl who is in India to complete her graduation. However, things become complicated when she wants to go back.

title: Mary Albert
subTitle: Owing to a Christian priest, a thug undergoes an extreme transformation. However, things get difficult when his past comes back to haunt him.

title: Sirayil Sila Raagangal
subTitle: An aspiring actor ends up in jail after seeking revenge for his sister's murder. Later, a filmmaker gets impressed by his skills during a prison visit and offers him a role.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Kannamoochi Yenada
subTitle: An architect falls for a psychiatry student but his uncle, who is his only guardian, arranges his marriage in a wealthy family. He tries to woo the parents of the girl he loves but then his uncle ruins his plans.

title: Manitharil Ithanai Nirangala
subTitle: Mohan falls in love with Santha, who has a dark past. However, she finds herself in a dilemma when she learns who Mohan's father is.

title: Raja Pandi
subTitle: When a man's mother is falsely convicted, he embarks on a mission to save her and kidnaps the daughters of some wealthy individuals.

title: Chinna Vaadhyaar
subTitle: A scientist gets into trouble when he develops a formula that enables the soul to move out of a body and enter the person or animal present in close proximity.

title: Pulikkuthi Pandi
subTitle: A rogue young man falls for a beautiful woman and tries to change his ways to impress her. However, things go awry when he finds himself at a crossroads with an influential man.

title: Bala
subTitle: Bala, a hitman, falls for the daughter of the rival gang's leader, but his love is threatened when the two gangs decide to forge family ties.

title: Bala
subTitle: Bala, a hitman, falls for the daughter of the rival gang's leader, but his love is threatened when the two gangs decide to forge family ties.

title: Thamizhachi
subTitle: After her husband is unjustly imprisoned on false charges, a woman refuses to step out of her house. With the arrival of a female reporter looking for true stories, the truth eventually comes out.

title: Brahmachari
subTitle: Ganesan and Malathi fall in love despite being from different economic backgrounds. However, Malathi's father, Thiruvadi, stands as an obstacle to their marriage.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Hello
subTitle: Chandru's friends make fun of him as he does not have a girlfriend. He points out at a girl claiming that she is his girlfriend, due to which a number of unfortunate events take place in her life.

title: Azhagesan
subTitle: Azhagesan, a man with a mental disability, secretly loves his cousin Nandini. However, when Sekhar, an evil man, rapes Nandini and beats Azhagesan, she ends up killing Sekhar and goes to prison.

title: Sabash
subTitle: Srinivasan, a man who is blind, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife, Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide but new evidence suggests foul play.

title: Salangai Oli
subTitle: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away which leaves him devastated.

title: Kaadhal Sugamanathu
subTitle: A woman loves a man but does not have the courage to confess her feelings. When she asks her younger sister to approach her love interest, her sister ends up betraying her.

title: Sakthivel
subTitle: An honest cop, Sakthivel, clashes with a powerful politician's son. Later, he is promoted and sent to a remote village where he uncovers a deeper corruption that puts his principles to the test.
